name: BB:CategoryDefinition: Elevated Process (Windows)
notes: The Building Block defines Windows processes with a high or system integrity level.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Elevated Process (Windows) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Integrity Level (custom) is any of [System or High]
TD_list: APPLY BB:CategoryDefinition: Elevated Process (Windows) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Integrity Level (custom) is any of [System or High]
